memoryArtifacts.headline: The Surname Doane
memoryArtifacts.description: The surname of DOANE and its variants DEVANE and DEVANEY descend from two O'Dubhain septs, one from County Kerry and the other from south Connacht. Also O'Duibheamhna in Oriel, where the name is deriv …

zh.St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire,: 英國爾塔爾波利聖 倫恩斯 邱奇
zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe於1501年出生在英國爾武特金頓。他於大約1520年與Katherine Wills在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1561年住在英國英格蘭爾。他去世於1561年11月6日在英國爾武特金頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國爾塔爾波利聖 倫恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾武特金頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe于1501年出生在英国爾武特金頓。他于大约1520年与Katherine Wills在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1561年住在英国英格兰爾。他去世于1561年11月6日在英国爾武特金頓享年60岁，埋葬在英国爾塔爾波利聖 倫恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Downe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe was born in 1501, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England. He married Katherine Wills about 1520, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He lived in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1561. He died on 6 November 1561, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe est né en 1501, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Katherine Wills environ 1520, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1561. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1561, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. 1561 hat er in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 6. Vissuto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1561. Morì il 6 novembre 1561, nel Utkinton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire, England.

ja.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Downeは1501年にイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで生まれた。約1520年にイギリスデボンでKatherine Willsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1561年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1561年11月6日にイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで60歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアタープオルリースト ヘレン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 터아르포를리 스트 헬'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe(은)는 1501년 영국 체실르 우트킨턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1520년 영국 데폰에서 Katherine Wills(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1561년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 살았다. 그는 1561년 11월 6일 영국 체실르 우트킨턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 터아르포를리 스트 헬'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire,: St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe nasceu em 1501, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Katherine Wills aproximadamente 1520, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1561. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1561, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Helen's Church, Tarporley, Cheshire,: ст хелен'с чурч, тарпорли, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Downe родился в 1501 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Wills около 1520 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он жил в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1561 году. Он умер 6 ноября 1561 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст хелен'с чурч, тарпорли, чешир, Англия.

Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1561.
